hooks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import os, runpy, sys; p=Path.cwd().resolve(); env=[Path(os.environ[k]).resolve() for k in ('WORKBENCH_ROOT','CODEX_WORKBENCH_ROOT','CODEX_WORKSPACE') if os.environ.get(k)]; root=next((x for x in (*env,p,*p.parents) if (x/'CURRENT.md').exists() and (x/'services'/'registry.yaml').exists()), None); hooks=(root/'.codex'/'hooks') if root else None; sys.exit(0) if root is None else (sys.path.insert(0, str(hooks)) or runpy.run_path(str(hooks/'session_start.py'), run_name='__main__'))"
hooks.statusMessage: 读取 Workbench 入口提醒

hooks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import os, runpy, sys; p=Path.cwd().resolve(); env=[Path(os.environ[k]).resolve() for k in ('WORKBENCH_ROOT','CODEX_WORKBENCH_ROOT','CODEX_WORKSPACE') if os.environ.get(k)]; root=next((x for x in (*env,p,*p.parents) if (x/'CURRENT.md').exists() and (x/'services'/'registry.yaml').exists()), None); hooks=(root/'.codex'/'hooks') if root else None; sys.exit(0) if root is None else (sys.path.insert(0, str(hooks)) or runpy.run_path(str(hooks/'user_prompt_submit.py'), run_name='__main__'))"
